sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 17g. saturated fat is one of the main pressure points. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole profile down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 17g. saturated fat is one of the main pressure points. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole profile down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 3.1g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 3.1g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 28g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for dairy, useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 28g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for dairy, useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 28% DV, vitamin a at 12% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 28% DV, vitamin a at 12% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 51% DV, zinc at 19% DV, magnesium at 5% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 51% DV, zinc at 19% DV, magnesium at 5% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Mozzarella stands out for easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. but it also gets held back by not everyone tolerates dairy well and fat quality varies wildly across dairy. Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
